utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each includes the requested information: coverage details (what is covered), costs (monthly and annual), and for total_budget, a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown is given. All specifications are fully filled out and appropriate to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: health_coverage (LifeFirst with policies POL-LF-001 and POL-VP-001), property_coverage (PrimeHome), travel_coverage (PrimeTravel), and additional_services (PremiumSecure Luxury). Based on the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8) for both physical_health and mental_health; PrimeHome corresponds to PrimeHome Premium Coverage (rating 10); PrimeTravel corresponds to PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 10); and PremiumSecure Luxury corresponds to Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10), as it offers premium membership benefits with priority claims and dedicated advisor matching that description.
